description_for_human: Runs governed HR Service Delivery scenario chains: grounded answers, HITL gate, audit ledger, KPIs.
description_for_model: Runs HR Service Delivery (Tier-0) scenario chains. Use runScenario to answer any employee HR request: pass the scenario_id (hr-hrsd-01 policy Q&A, hr-hrsd-02 status lookup, hr-hrsd-03 knowledge-base search, hr-hrsd-04 life-event guidance, hr-hrsd-05 leave & absence, hr-hrsd-06 letter generation, hr-hrsd-07 data correction, hr-hrsd-08 ticket deflection/routing, hr-hrsd-09 multilingual) and the employee's request as text. The response contains the grounded answer, the human-in-the-loop gate outcome (approved / escalated / pending), the escalation route if any, the KPIs the run moves, and the full audit ledger. Use listScenarios to discover scenarios and getScenario for one scenario's specification.

functions.name: listScenarios
functions.description: List the available HR Service Delivery scenarios with their chain shape and HITL mode.

functions.name: getScenario
functions.description: Get one scenario's full specification: personas, KPIs, Azure services, and a sample request.

functions.name: runScenario
functions.description: Run a scenario chain for an employee request. Returns the grounded answer, the step-16 HITL gate outcome, the escalation route if any, the KPIs moved, and the audit ledger.
